title: Image 2 of Muscatine weekly journal (Muscatine, Iowa), July 5, 1861
description: WEEKLY JOURNAL JOHN MAHIN EDITOR CITY OF IHVSCAT1NE fRIDAY JULY 5 1861 REPUBLICAN STATE CONVENTION A StAt Convention of the Republican of Iowa is tailed to assemble by their delegate at the City ot Moines at 10 oclock A U on Wednesday July 31st 1801 for the nomination of officers to be elected at tht genoral election in October of this year Cnudidatee re to selected for the offices of Governor Lieutenant governor and one Judge of the Supreme Court The Convention will take such otlur action as may in iU Opinion contribute to the ucces of the Republican Srery organized county will be entitled to one dele gat in the Convention and one additional delegate fur each 900 votes and for any additional fraction of or more votes cast at the last General Election tor Uon Abraham Lincoln as President vt thr I nited State Republican County Central Committee are requested to call their conventions to select their delegates in the ratio aboe stated and for efficient organisation prepar atory to the canvass H M HOXIE Chairman State Central Com Samuel F Miller Lee County J B Weaver Davis George A llawley Pecatur Levi it Smith Koenuth W B
